data.body: EPIC COMPLETION SUMMARY + OPERATOR HANDOFF. All 19 child stories are IMPLEMENTED, reviewed, and LANDED on main via Gerrit (changes 537-555 + 559, each LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1, submitted/MERGED). 18/19 children are fully certified-closed (plan-review + completion-verifier signed). The 19th, 5f39, is code-complete + landed + completion-verified on every CODE criterion, and was force-closed UNSIGNED because its single [operator-attested] AC3 is genuinely pending an operator action outside any code change: configuring the GitHub repo VARIABLES (JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_PROJECT, ACLI_VERSION/ACLI_SHA256) + SECRET (JIRA_API_TOKEN), provisioning a dedicated disposable Jira test project, and recording a green workflow_dispatch canary-run URL (live Jira test EXECUTED, not all-skip). Epic ACs otherwise met: change-detector tests converted to behavioral coverage (no test in the changed set asserts only hasattr/private-constant/source-substring); missing data-safety/concurrency regression tests added deterministically (barrier/instrumented seams, not sleep-timing); two thin production paths hardened (index.lock TOCTOU df83, _acquire_fcntl errno df7b) with RED-first tests; two doc drifts reconciled (7f1b coverage.md, b1ea dual_window). Discovered work filed: bug 4c6c (fsck Check3 shares the df83 TOCTOU). TO CERTIFY THIS EPIC: complete 5f39's operator AC3, re-verify 5f39 (reopen->close to earn its completion-verifier signature), then re-close this epic to earn its signature.
